description: Pins the label-required rejection and the 3-32 length + charset rejections now enforced in both languages (Go gained Python's checks), plus the create POST.

cases.name: rejects a label with invalid characters
cases.expect_error: label may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This creates a Longview client and returns setup credentials. Set confirm=true to proceed.
